summary: Revalidated the Buddhavamsa B-line queue after A-line bootstrap. The project now has 208 registered documents and 208 per-document status files, but every document remains at source_ready. No revisions, draft1, draft2, draft3 handoff, draft3 manuscript, or draft4 manuscript files exist, so no document is eligible for B-line work.

issues.detail: B-line actionable queue remains 0 for draft3_handoff_ready, draft3_requested, draft3_generated, final_scan_done, and final_review.
All 208 data/status/{doc_id}.json files are currently source_ready, so no document has reached draft2_done or human_review_ready.
outputs/manuscripts/draft1/, draft2/, draft3/, and draft4/ contain no manuscript files beyond placeholders.

next_recommended_action: No B-line child tasks should be created yet. Resume B00 only when at least one doc_id has advanced through A-line to draft2_done or human_review_ready and a valid human-confirmed handoff/draft3/{doc_id}.json exists for B02 validation.
